description: Phase 009 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Independent lever from packet 008 — cuts Qwen's memory footprint via fp16 weights so the same 50-doc batch may fit on Apple Silicon MPS without OOM. Adds RERANK_TORCH_DTYPE env var to the sidecar. PROMOTE iff hit-rate +3, p95 ≤ +500ms, sidecar reach ≥ 95%.
